hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; ROOT=/Users/akshayrr/Documents/projects/ecom-dynamic-catelog-system; if [[ "$FILE" == */backend/* ]]; then cd "$ROOT/backend" && npm test --silent 2>&1 | tail -25; elif [[ "$FILE" == */frontend/* ]]; then cd "$ROOT/frontend" && npm test --silent 2>&1 | tail -25; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == */backend/src/* || "$FILE" == */frontend/src/* ]]; then if [[ "$FILE" != *.test.js && "$FILE" != *.test.jsx && "$FILE" != *.spec.js && "$FILE" != *.spec.jsx ]]; then echo "TDD CHECK: Did you write and confirm a failing test BEFORE this edit? If not, stop and write it now (RED before GREEN)."; fi; fi

ROOT=/Users/akshayrr/Documents/projects/ecom-dynamic-catelog-system; FAIL=0; if [ -d "$ROOT/backend" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/backend/package.json" ]; then cd "$ROOT/backend" && npm test --silent 2>/dev/null || FAIL=1; fi; if [ -d "$ROOT/frontend" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/frontend/package.json" ]; then cd "$ROOT/frontend" && npm test --silent 2>/dev/null || FAIL=1; fi; if [ $FAIL -eq 1 ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Tests are failing. Fix red tests before stopping.'; exit 2; fi
